Home.title: Billing and invoices foundation for Hostinvo
Home.description: The platform now adds a tenant-aware billing layer on top of authentication, tenancy, client management, product catalog, and order foundations: invoices, invoice items, manual payment foundations, transaction history, recurring billing fields, and protected billing pages in Next.js.
Home.backendDescription: Laravel 11 now exposes tenant-aware `/api/v1/admin/invoices`, `/invoices/{id}/payments`, and `/payments` endpoints with policies, validation, invoice totals, recurring billing fields, credit foundation, and refund/payment tracking foundations.
Home.frontendDescription: Next.js now ships protected invoice list and detail pages, invoice create and edit flows, and a payments history placeholder with English and Arabic labels plus RTL-aware layouts.
Home.servicesDescription: Phase 6 is limited to billing and invoices only. Payment gateway integrations, provisioning, and support remain intentionally unimplemented.
Home.deliverable1: Tenant-scoped invoices and invoice items linked to clients and optional orders
Home.deliverable2: Billing APIs with due dates, paid dates, recurring billing fields, credits, refunds, and manual payment foundations
Home.deliverable3: Protected Next.js invoice list, detail, and create or edit pages
Home.deliverable4: Payments history placeholder and invoice detail payment or transaction views
Home.deliverable5: English and Arabic billing labels plus RTL readiness

Auth.loginDescription: Authenticate with your Hostinvo account to access your tenant workspace.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and Hostinvo will send a password reset link.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for your Hostinvo account.
Auth.resetPasswordPlaceholder: This page is ready for the password reset flow and uses the backend reset endpoint when a token is present.
Auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
Auth.forgotPasswordError: Unable to send the reset link.
Auth.tokenMissing: The reset token is missing. Open the link from your email to continue.
Auth.dashboardDescription: This placeholder confirms that the tenant-aware auth foundation is working before later modules are added.
Auth.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the authentication service.

Dashboard.overviewDescription: Review the current tenant context, assigned roles, and the available client, catalog, order, and billing entry points before later business modules are added.
Dashboard.clientModuleDescription: Create client records, manage contacts and addresses, and review client activity logs inside the current tenant workspace.
Dashboard.catalogModuleDescription: Organize product groups, manage hosting plans, define configurable options, and maintain billing-cycle pricing inside the current tenant workspace.
Dashboard.ordersModuleDescription: Create draft orders, review checkout totals, place orders into the tenant workflow, and inspect order details without generating invoices yet.
Dashboard.billingModuleDescription: Create invoices, review billing balances, inspect payment history, and keep recurring billing fields ready without adding gateway integrations yet.

Billing.listDescription: Manage tenant invoices, due dates, billing balances, and linked order references inside the current workspace.
Billing.createDescription: Create a tenant invoice from a client, optional order reference, recurring billing fields, and invoice items.
Billing.editDescription: Update {reference} and keep its billing dates, invoice items, and balance fields aligned with the current tenant.
Billing.detailsDescription: Complete tenant-scoped invoice details including linked client, optional order, invoice items, payments, and transactions.
Billing.paymentsDescription: Review tenant payment and refund history while gateway integrations remain intentionally unimplemented.
Billing.searchPlaceholder: Search by invoice reference, client, or order
Billing.paymentsSearchPlaceholder: Search by payment reference, invoice, or client
Billing.emptyStateDescription: Create the first tenant invoice to start the billing workflow foundation.
Billing.paymentsEmptyDescription: Payments and refunds will appear here after manual recording or later gateway integrations.
Billing.itemsDescription: Build invoice items manually or import them from a linked tenant order.
Billing.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the billing service.
Billing.orderImportError: Unable to import the selected order into the invoice form.

Orders.listDescription: Manage tenant orders, inspect checkout totals, and place draft orders inside the current workspace.
Orders.createDescription: Compose a tenant order from clients, products, billing cycles, and configurable options before reviewing totals.
Orders.reviewDescription: Review calculated subtotal, discount, tax, and total amounts before saving a draft or placing the order.
Orders.detailsDescription: Complete tenant-scoped order details including linked client, item snapshots, and calculated totals.
Orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by reference number or client
Orders.emptyStateDescription: Create the first tenant order to start the checkout workflow foundation.
Orders.itemsDescription: Build the order contents using tenant products and their available billing cycles.
Orders.noConfigurableOptions: No configurable options for this product.
Orders.reviewMissingDraft: The order draft was not found. Start again from the create-order page.
Orders.reviewError: Unable to calculate the order review.
Orders.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the order service.
Orders.draftStorageError: Unable to store the order draft locally for the review step.

Catalog.productGroupsDescription: Manage the catalog structure for this tenant by organizing products into groups with controlled visibility and ordering.
Catalog.productsListDescription: Manage hosting products, configurable options, visibility, and pricing access points inside the current tenant workspace.
Catalog.createProductDescription: Create a new tenant product with product-group assignment, visibility rules, and configurable options.
Catalog.editProductDescription: Update {name} and keep its catalog metadata and configurable options aligned with the current tenant.
Catalog.pricingDescription: Manage the billing-cycle pricing matrix for {name} without touching later billing or ordering modules.
Catalog.groupCreateDescription: Define a reusable grouping structure for the tenant catalog before orders and provisioning are introduced.
Catalog.groupSearchPlaceholder: Search by group name or slug
Catalog.productSearchPlaceholder: Search by product name, slug, or SKU
Catalog.saveError: Unable to save the catalog record.
Catalog.deleteError: Unable to delete the product group.
Catalog.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the catalog service.
Catalog.groupsEmptyDescription: Create the first product group in this tenant to organize the catalog for later phases.
Catalog.productsEmptyDescription: Create the first product in this tenant to prepare the catalog for orders and billing in later phases.
Catalog.configurableOptionsDescription: Define the future purchasable choices that will later feed the ordering and provisioning flows.
Catalog.pricingRowDescription: Keep the billing cycle enabled only when the product should be available for that term.

Clients.listDescription: Manage tenant client records, contacts, addresses, and audit activity without leaving the current workspace.
Clients.createDescription: Create a new tenant client profile with the contact and address structure needed for later phases.
Clients.editDescription: Update {name} and keep its contacts, addresses, and status aligned with the current tenant.
Clients.detailsDescription: Complete tenant-scoped client profile including contacts, addresses, and recent activity.
Clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone
Clients.emptyStateDescription: Create the first client in this tenant to start building the customer directory.
Clients.contactsDescription: Track the people related to this client and mark a primary contact for future workflows.
Clients.addressesDescription: Keep billing, mailing, and service addresses attached to the client record.
Clients.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the client service.
